title: Your Photo Library
drDigitalIntro:
Your photo app is where all your pictures live.
• Scroll through every photo — newest first.
• Click a photo to see it full size.
• Photos are organized by date, and you can search them. Let's explore!

steps.say: Click on the Beach Vacation photo to view it.
Click Back, then open the Dog at the Park photo.
Click Back, then open the Orange Cat photo.

drDigitalSuccess: You found your way around the photo library! Click any photo to view it full size.
drDigitalHint: Click on a photo thumbnail to open it and see it larger.
